prestazioni: Engine swap to a Volvo B20E (2.0L inline-4, 115 HP stock) with a forged internals build including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from SCAT Enterprises. Pair with a custom camshaft grind from Schrick (272° duration, 0.480" lift) for high-RPM power delivery.

Forced induction via a Rotrex C30-94 supercharger (10 psi max boost) with a custom air-to-water intercooler setup using a PWR Racing heat exchanger and Bosch 044 fuel pump. ECU tuning handled by Megasquirt MS3Pro with custom maps for E85 compatibility and sequential fuel injection using ID1000 injectors.

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins Road & Track coilovers (adjustable damping and ride height) paired with polygraphite bushings from Powerflex (front control arms, subframe, and trailing arms). Braking upgraded to Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers with 12.19" vented rotors up front and 2-piston rear calipers with 11.75" rotors, using Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a bespoke fiberglass kit from Kamei (Germany), extending fenders by 2.5" and incorporating integrated side skirts with a functional air curtain design. Rear quarter panels modified to house custom LED taillight clusters from Hella (H7 bulbs, smoked lenses).

Front end restomod with a custom carbon fiber hood (hand-laid by Carbonworks) featuring a central NACA duct for intercooler airflow, paired with a Volvo P1800-style mesh grille from Autocult (brushed aluminum finish). Lower bumper replaced with a custom 3D-printed splitter (PETG material) with integrated tow hooks.

Interior retrimmed in full Alcantara (Automobili Lamborghini-sourced material) with custom door cards, dashboard top, and headliner. Seats replaced with Recaro SRD-E (E30 M3 pattern) in black Alcantara with red stitching, mounted on custom subframes for lowered seating position. Steering wheel swapped for a Nardi Classic 380mm (wood/leather) with a quick-release hub from NRG Innovations.
